sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_map_data (key String, value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY key;
SELECT mapSort(map(key, value)) AS sorted_map FROM test_map_data WHERE key IS NOT NULL;
SELECT mapSort((k, v) -> v + 1, map(key, value)) AS sorted_map FROM test_map_data WHERE key GLOBAL IN (SELECT DISTINCT key FROM test_map_data WHERE value > 2);
SELECT mapSort(map(key, value)) AS sorted_map FROM test_map_data GROUP BY key HAVING count(*) > 1;
SELECT key, mapSort((k, v) -> v * 2, map(key, value)) AS doubled_sorted_map FROM test_map_data WHERE value GLOBAL IN (SELECT value FROM test_map_data WHERE value < 4) GROUP BY key;
SELECT mapSort(map(key, value)) AS sorted_map FROM (SELECT key, value FROM test_map_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) WHERE key IS NOT NULL;
SELECT mapSort(map(key, coalesce(value, 0))) AS sorted_map FROM test_map_data WHERE NOT key GLOBAL IN (SELECT key FROM test_map_data WHERE value IS NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_junction (id Int32, map_key String, map_value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, mapSort(map(map_key, map_value)) AS sorted_map FROM test_junction GROUP BY id HAVING id GLOBAL IN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_junction WHERE map_value IS NOT NULL);
